message:
🐛 Fix deep-link race condition and add Share button next to Import (#1640)

Save the deep-link mission slug in a ref so it survives the URL param
being removed before data loads. Previously, MissionSidebar cleared
?mission= immediately after opening the browser, but mission data hadn't
loaded yet — the slug was lost and the card never auto-selected.

Also move the Share button next to the Import button in the card footer
for both InstallerCard and SolutionCard so it's always visible.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -326,16 +326,33 @@ export function InstallerCard({ mission, onImport, onSelect, onCopyLink, compact )} - +
+ {onCopyLink && ( + + )} + +

@@ -127,15 +127,32 @@ export function SolutionCard({ mission, onImport, onSelect, onCopyLink, compact {mission.steps?.length ?? 0} steps )} - +
+ {onCopyLink && ( + + )} + +
)
